issue_summary: Reuse commons-io, don't duplicate class FileTimes (deprecated TimeUtils methods)
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Converts NTFS time (100 nanosecond units since 1 January 1601) to Java time.
     *
     * @param ntfsTime the NTFS time in 100 nanosecond units
     * @return the Date
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Converts NTFS time (100 nanosecond units since 1 January 1601) to Java time.
     *
     * @param ntfsTime the NTFS time in 100 nanosecond units.
     * @return the Date.
     * @deprecated Use {@link FileTimes#ntfsTimeToDate(long)}.
     */
